title: hieracium copholepium
intro: Hieracium copholepium, also known as Hawkweed or Hieracium, is a perennial plant species belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Hieracium copholepium include its ability to reduce swelling, treat wounds, and ease digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Hieracium copholepium often involve infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water to make a tea, which is used to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
